heading: Settlement of accounts: oaths
label: 9839 Settlement of accounts: oaths
text: The Secretary of the Air Force may detail any employee of the Department of the Air Force to administer oaths required by law in the settlement of an officer’s accounts for clothing and other military supplies. An oath administered under this section shall be without expense to the person to whom it is administered.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)983910:1303.R.S. 225 (1st sentence).The words “and other military supplies” are substituted for the words “camp and garrison equipage, quartermaster’s stores, and ordnance” to conform to . The words “person to whom administered” are substituted for the words “parties taking them.” The words “for the purpose of” are omitted as surplusage.section 9838 of this title
